title: Add flag to remove containers on commit
body:
I think this would be good practice to eliminate wasted disk space.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I first brought this up back in https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/2
